body.purpose: Listing titles, descriptions, nav links. Max 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Badges, chips, date stamps, sort controls.

shadows.name: modal-lift
shadows.purpose: Modal overlay only. Signals full z-elevation detachment from the page.

shadows.name: listing-hover
shadows.purpose: Listing row on hover only. Confirms interactivity; not a resting-state shadow.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Progress bar fill and element entrance animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA: Add item, Save, Confirm. Always ink background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #18181b; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 20px; font-family: Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3f3f46; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #18181b; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost action: Cancel, Refresh, secondary nav. Border-only, no fill at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #ffffff; color: #52525b; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #fafafa; border-color: #d4d4d8; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #18181b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Listing Row
components.description: The core browsing unit. Image left, title + price top-right, site badge + date bottom-right. Starred variant adds amber border and ring.
components.html:
Fjällräven Kånken, Forest Green, 16L

450 kr

Tradera 2026-05-10
components.css: .ds-listing-row { display: flex; gap: 16px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-listing-row:hover { border-color: #a1a1aa; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-listing-image { width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 8px; background: #f4f4f5; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-listing-image img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .ds-listing-body { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; padding: 2px 0; } .ds-listing-top { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; } .ds-listing-title { font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #18181b; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0; } .ds-listing-price { font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #18181b; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; margin: 0; } .ds-listing-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-listing-date { font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #a1a1aa; } .ds-badge { display: inline-block; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 8px; } .ds-badge-tradera { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; } .ds-badge-blocket { background: #ffedd5; color: #c2410c; } .ds-badge-vinted { background: #ccfbf1; color: #0f766e; } .ds-badge-sellpy { background: #f3e8ff; color: #7e22ce; }

components.name: Listing Row (Starred)
components.description: Starred variant: amber border + ring. The only surface in the system with a color accent at rest.
components.html:
Fjällräven Totepack No.1

380 kr

Sellpy 2026-05-11
components.css: .ds-listing-starred { border-color: #fcd34d; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #fde68a; } .ds-star-btn { background: none; border: none; padding: 2px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; transition: background 0.1s; } .ds-star-btn:hover { background: #f4f4f5; } .ds-star-btn--off svg { fill: none; stroke: #d4d4d8; } .ds-star-btn--off:hover svg { stroke: #a1a1aa; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Search, brand, item name fields. White surface, default border, focus shifts border color.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d4d4d8; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Geist, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #18181b; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a1a1aa; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #71717a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(24,24,27,0.06); }

components.name: Watchlist Item Card
components.description: Draggable item in the watchlist. Shows brand + name, category pills, list pills, and lowest price.
components.html:
Fjällräven Kånken

320 kr
Bags Wishlist
components.css: .ds-item-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; cursor: grab; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-item-card:hover { border-color: #a1a1aa; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-item-card-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; } .ds-item-card-name { font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #18181b; margin: 0; } .ds-item-card-brand { color: #a1a1aa; font-weight: 400; } .ds-item-card-price { font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #18181b; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-item-card-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; margin-top: 10px; } .ds-tag { display: inline-block; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; padding: 3px 10px; } .ds-tag-blue { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; } .ds-tag-list { display: inline-block; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; padding: 3px 10px; border: 1.5px solid; } .ds-tag-list-zinc { border-color: #a1a1aa; color: #52525b; }

components.name: Site Toggle Card
components.description: Settings page site card. Enabled: dark border, full opacity. Disabled: light border, 60% opacity. Toggle in top-right.
components.html:
B

Blocket

blocket.se

Sweden's largest classifieds marketplace.

Classifieds
components.css: .ds-site-card { display: flex; gap: 12px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; user-select: none; } .ds-site-card--on { border-color: #18181b; background: #ffffff; } .ds-site-card--off { border-color: #e4e4e7; background: #fafafa; opacity: 0.6; } .ds-site-card-avatar { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-site-avatar-blocket { background: #ffedd5; color: #c2410c; } .ds-site-card-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-site-card-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; } .ds-site-card-name { font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #18181b; margin: 0; } .ds-site-card-url { font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #a1a1aa; margin: 2px 0 0; } .ds-site-card-desc { font-family: Geist, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #52525b; margin: 8px 0 6px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-toggle { width: 36px; height: 20px; border-radius: 9999px; display: flex; align-items: center; transition: background 0.2s; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-toggle--on { background: #18181b; padding-left: 18px; } .ds-toggle--off { background: #e4e4e7; padding-left: 2px; } .ds-toggle-thumb { display: block; width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .ds-tag-zinc { background: #f4f4f5; color: #3f3f46; }

narrative.overview:
Second Hand Deals is a curated deal tracker, not a comparison engine. The interface should feel like a trusted friend who has done the searching for you and laid the results out on a clean table. Every screen is an invitation to browse, not a wall of data to parse. Restraint earns the warmth; warmth earns the trust.

The palette is intentionally lean: bare canvas, ink, and borders do almost all the structural work. Color appears as signal (amber for favorites, green for success, site-tinted badges for provenance) rather than decoration. This sparseness is what lets items feel curated rather than dumped.

The visual language owes a debt to Are.na: considered spacing, clean typographic hierarchy, surfaces that recede so content can breathe. But unlike Are.na's cool neutrality, this system has a smile.
keyCharacteristics: Near-flat surfaces separated by borders, never shadows at rest
Geist Sans at two weights (400, 600) for nearly all hierarchy
Ink (near-black) as the single primary action color
Amber as the one personal accent: appears only on starred/favorited items
Site provenance communicated through soft tinted badge pills, not icons
Rounded corners throughout: inputs and buttons at 12px, pills at full

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: Amber is the only personal color in the system. It marks what the user has decided matters. Never use amber for anything except the starred/favorite state.

rules.name: The Site Badge Rule
rules.body: Platform provenance is the only place where categorical color appears. These badge tints are functional labels, not brand elements. They must always appear at low saturation (100-level tint).

rules.name: The Two-Weight Rule
rules.body: Only regular (400) and semibold (600) are used. Medium (500) appears only on label-scale text. No bold (700), no light (300). Hierarchy is achieved through size ratios, not weight proliferation.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface carries a shadow at rest. The only exception is the modal overlay. Everything else: borders only.

dos: Do use border-zinc-200 as the default dividing line. Borders do all structural separation work.
Do reserve amber entirely for the starred/favorite state. Its scarcity is what makes it meaningful.
Do use site-tinted badges at the 100-level tint only. Higher saturation badges would compete with content.
Do keep modals as a last resort. Most interactions should happen inline.
Do use rounded-xl (12px) for interactive surfaces. rounded-full for pills only.
Do allow white cards to float on bare-canvas using border-zinc-200, not shadow.
Do communicate status through typography weight and color shifts, not icons alone.
donts: Don't use a sidebar nav, metric cards, or gradient banners. This is not a SaaS dashboard.
Don't make this look or feel like Blocket, Tradera, or eBay.
Don't use dark mode with neon accents, terminal aesthetics, or glassmorphism.
Don't use hero sections, gradient text, or animations for their own sake.
Don't use border-left or border-right as a colored accent stripe on any card, callout, or alert.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient text. Use a solid color.
Don't add a second accent color. One ink, one amber. Adding a second accent dissolves the amber's meaning.
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't nest cards. A card inside a card is always a layout problem in disguise.
